template_name: Standard Prescription Format – Gestational Age Assessment in Newborns
condition: Assessment of Gestational Age in Newborns
indications_for_ga_assessment: Birth weight not matching expected size for gestation

clinical_tools.scoring_note: Each item scored 0–5; total score converted to gestational age

preterm_features: Ear cartilage flat or stays folded
term_features: Female: labia majora cover labia minora

documentation: Mention consistency or discrepancy with available records

investigations_advised.indication: If syndromic concern or unclear maturity
If discordance with clinical signs or abnormal neurological findings

non_pharmacological_advice: Assess GA clinically when records are uncertain
Monitor feeding, weight, and thermoregulation according to maturity
Document GA clearly in OPD record

less_than_34_weeks_or_unclear_ga: Refer to hospital for full neonatal evaluation

red_flags: Growth abnormalities not matching gestational age
Major discrepancy between Ballard score and available antenatal records
parent_counseling: Explain why correct gestational age matters for feeding, warmth, screening, and monitoring
Clarify that prematurity does not always mean low birth weight alone
Reassure in mild prematurity with proper follow-up
Discuss need for closer monitoring if baby appears less mature
opd_checklist: Weight and head circumference correlated with gestational age?

follow_up.routine_term_baby: As per standard newborn follow-up schedule
follow_up.late_preterm_or_mild_discrepancy: Early follow-up in 48–72 hours or as clinically indicated

counselling: Gestational age tells us how mature your baby is — गर्भकालीन आयु बताती है कि आपका बच्चा कितना परिपक्व है
Correct gestational age matters for feeding, warmth, screening, and monitoring — सही गर्भकालीन आयु दूध पिलाने, गर्मी, जांच और निगरानी के लिए ज़रूरी है
Prematurity does not always mean low birth weight alone — समय से पहले जन्म का मतलब सिर्फ़ कम वज़न नहीं है
Mild prematurity is manageable with proper follow-up — हल्की अपरिपक्वता सही देखभाल से ठीक हो जाती है
Closer monitoring may be needed if baby appears less mature — अगर बच्चा कम परिपक्व दिखे तो ज़्यादा निगरानी की ज़रूरत हो सकती है
warning_signs: Poor feeding or weak suck — कम दूध पीना या कमज़ोर चूसना
Temperature instability (feeling cold or hot) — तापमान अस्थिरता (ठंडा या गर्म लगना)
Breathing difficulty or apnea — सांस लेने में तकलीफ़ या सांस रुकना
Poor weight gain — वज़न न बढ़ना
Lethargy or irritability — सुस्ती या चिड़चिड़ापन
expected_course: Term infants (37-42 weeks) follow standard growth trajectories. Late preterm infants (34-36 weeks) may have feeding difficulties and temperature instability for the first 1-2 weeks but generally catch up by 4-6 weeks. Very preterm infants (<34 weeks) require specialized care. Growth and development milestones should be assessed using corrected age for preterm infants until 2 years.
key_clinical_points: New Ballard Score is the standard clinical tool for GA assessment (valid 20-44 weeks)
Best performed within first 4 days of life
Six neuromuscular + six physical maturity criteria scored
Early ultrasound (first trimester) is the most accurate method for GA dating
Classify as SGA/AGA/LGA based on weight-for-GA centile
Use corrected age for growth and development in preterms
Use chronological age for vaccination scheduling

monitoring_parameters.frequency: At birth, daily if admitted, then weekly for first month
At birth and at each visit
Every 4-6 hours for late preterm; at each visit for term
At each feed for first week; then at each visit
If preterm, SGA, LGA, or IDM — per protocol
